heading: Transfer of functions
label: 21132 Transfer of functions
text: There are transferred to the Election Assistance Commission established under all functions which the Federal Election Commission exercised under before .section 20921 of this titlesection 20508(a) of this titleOctober 29, 2002
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 15532 of Title 42
